news.t: Ninepoint Partners Launches Carbon Credit Fund on the NEO Exchange

overview.description: The VanEck China Bond ETF (CBON) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a broad index of fixed-rate, investment-grade onshore Chinese Yuan-denominated bonds with maturities of 0-10 years. CBON was launched on Nov 10, 2014 and is issued by VanEck.
infoTable: FTSE Chinese Broad Bond 0-10 Years Diversified Select Index - CNY

data.title: Ninepoint Partners Launches Carbon Credit Fund on the NEO Exchange
data.text: TORONTO--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $CBON #CarbonCredit--With much excitement, NEO proudly welcomes Ninepoint Partners LP (“Ninepoint”) back to the NEO Exchange with the launch of the Ninepoint Carbon Credit...
